# vmlinux

```text
usage: vmlinux [-h] [-t TOOL] filepath

```

Load bzImage or vmlinux file to add kernel debug symbols.
### Positional arguments

|Positional Argument|Help|
| :--- | :--- |
|filepath|Path to the bzImage or vmlinux file to load|

### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
|-t|--tool|Path to the vmlinux-to-elf tool (if not in PATH)|
